summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

raw_articles.title: AirPods maker Luxshare slides over 5% in Hong Kong market debut
raw_articles.summary: The company, which is already listed in Shenzhen, had priced shares in the IPO at 63.28 Hong Kong dollars apiece, raising HK$24.27 billion ($3.09 billion).

raw_articles.title: Corsair Discount Code: Up to 50% Off for July 2026
raw_articles.summary: Upgrade your gaming setup or PC build for less with these verified Corsair coupon codes, student discounts, and refurbished deals.

raw_articles.title: Meta’s Muse Image Might be Just What SMBs Need
raw_articles.summary: Meta’s new AI imaging model enables users to create competitive ad content on the social media giant’s platforms.

raw_articles.title: Jim Cramer sees a big risk to the bull market resurfacing — and it's not the Iran war
raw_articles.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said the growing wave of stock offerings and debt issuance is the next big threat to the bull market.

raw_articles.title: SpaceX's Grok 4.5 launches at half the price of rivals — here's why that could rattle Anthropic and OpenAI
raw_articles.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX released Grok 4.5 on Wednesday, the first artificial intelligence model the company has trained specifically for coding and autonomous agents — and the first tangible product of its $60 billion acquisition of the AI coding startup Cursor, completed just weeks ago.The launch marks a pivotal test of the sprawling, vertically integrated AI empire Musk has assembled over the past six months, and of a strategy that bets developers care less about topping benchmark leaderboards

raw_articles.title: SpaceX stock closes below debut price at $148 in two-day slide after Nasdaq-100 inclusion
raw_articles.summary: SpaceX's record IPO raised a total of $85.7 billion after underwriters exercised the "greenshoe" overallotment.

raw_articles.title: 'I'm not a programmer' anymore: Linus Torvalds on the only two tools he uses now
raw_articles.summary: At the Open Source Summit in Mumbai, Torvalds discusses the pain and power of AI in the kernel, and why Linux no longer supports 'museum' technology.

raw_articles.title: Messi and Ronaldo Are Building Tech Portfolios. Mo Salah Is Playing a Different Game
raw_articles.summary: Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo are betting on AI, health tech, and startups. Mohamed Salah is taking a more traditional route beyond football.

raw_articles.title: Google’s deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic
raw_articles.summary: Earlier this week, a picture seemed to show Kentucky Senator Mitch McConnell covered in tubes in a hospital bed in a state of extreme distress. It turned out to be an AI-generated fake.

raw_articles.title: The FTC Settlement With John Deere Is a Huge Win for the Right-to-Repair Movement
raw_articles.summary: After more than a decade of pushback, farmers and repair advocates have won access to equipment and services John Deere had long kept under its control.

raw_articles.title: I Built a Self-Improving AI, and So Can You
raw_articles.summary: Experiments in using AI to build AI show that the future doesn’t just belong to the frontier labs.

raw_articles.title: Nvidia, Hugging Face Collaborate on Open Source Robot Models
raw_articles.summary: The move is seen as supporting accessibility and deployment for physical AI and also boosting Nvidia’s already strong presence in the field.

raw_articles.title: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
raw_articles.summary: Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.

raw_articles.title: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
raw_articles.summary: General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.
